_doc: Program-2 mechanism registry. HUMAN-EDITED ONLY (REG-INV-22 extended): the agent may cite these cards, never create or modify them. Every pool candidate names one card; the program's output is organized by hypothesis, not config soup.

cards.mechanism: Post-ETF (Jan 2024) institutional liquidity concentrates in US weekday sessions; weekends are thin and retail-driven, so weekend moves overshoot and revert. reversal_pch on weekend days IS a mean-reversion shape.
cards.economic_actor: retail flow without institutional depth; arbitrage capital offline
cards.predicted_sign: weekend BUY reversion carries the edge in constructive regimes
cards.literature: ETF-era weekday volume 2x weekends and widening (2026); weekend effect studies 2014-2024

cards.mechanism: Saturday specifically is the thinnest session of the week; the legacy EA family was built on it. Kept as the full-history control for WKND-MR.
cards.predicted_sign: regime-dependent: buys in bull, sells in bear (measured, not assumed)
cards.literature: own Q2-2026 exam: Saturday buys median PF 1.30, sells 0.875

cards.mechanism: Monday is the institutional re-entry session: weekend drift gets repriced when depth returns. Monday reversal buys had the top family median in the Q2 exam (1.369) at small n.
cards.economic_actor: institutional flow returning after the weekend vacuum

cards.mechanism: The dominant conditional structure in every measurement so far is regime asymmetry: buy edges appear in constructive (uptrend) regimes, sell edges in stressed ones. A slow trend state should pick the profitable side of a family.
cards.economic_actor: regime-dependent participation of trend-following and dip-buying flow
cards.predicted_sign: long-family in uptrend states, short-family or flat in downtrend states
cards.literature: own findings: buys won bull quarters, sells won bear windows (W2/W3 vs Q2-2026)

cards.mechanism: Mean-reversion pays when volatility is elevated but orderly and fails in vol collapse or explosion; a slow realized-vol tercile should gate family exposure.
cards.economic_actor: market-making capacity vs forced flow at vol extremes
cards.predicted_sign: family edge concentrated in specific vol terciles (measured which)
cards.literature: standard vol-regime conditioning; own vol_tercile regime (causal expanding terciles)

cards.mechanism: Weekend moves conditioned on the funding/positioning state going into the weekend: crowded longs into a thin session invite downside cascades; crowded shorts invite squeezes.
cards.economic_actor: leveraged perp positioning without weekend institutional depth
cards.predicted_sign: weekend SELL after extreme positive funding; weekend BUY after sustained negative funding
cards.literature: funding-regime evidence (crowded-short squeezes); lands with the week-4 futures data

cards.mechanism: Friday-close to Monday-open positioning transfer: the weekend session inherits Friday's institutional imbalance and hands it back Monday. Needs a session-boundary entry predicate the engine does not have yet.
cards.predicted_sign: to be registered before any test
